name: Dark Lizamon

signature_move.name: Dread Fire
signature_move.description: Incinerates the enemy's spirit with flames of darkness.

description: A Digimon whose whole body is covered in flames of darkness that burn quietly. As it is the form of a Flare Lizamon that evolved into a Virus-type, it has a cool-headed personality. Its Special Move is incinerating the enemy's spirit with flames of darkness ( Dread Fire ).
